title: OC 100A Addendum to “Mandatory Brand Guidelines for BHIM UPI”
text:
NEI»

NATIONAL PAYMENTS CORPORATION OF INDIA

NPCI/UPI/OC-100A/2022-2023 (Addendum) Daie: 02/03/2023
To,

All Member Banks, PSP, TPAPs, Unified Payment Interface (UPI)

Dear Sir/Madam,

Sub: Addendum to “Mandatory Brand Guidelines for BHIM UPI”

As the UPI ecosystem is growing towards 300 million transactions per day, it is essential to
educate users in order to maintain their faith in UPI. As new users are added to UPI on a daily
basis, an awareness video will assist users, particularly those with limited knowledge of

smartphone usage, to start using the app safely.

All UPI Apps (Bank Apps & TPAPs) should ensure to have the following:

1. When user installs and opens a UPI App, video on “How to use UP! safely” should be
availabie on the first screen of the App in a prominent place. In case playing the video in
the App is not feasible, link to the video may be provided.

2. There should be a provision to change the language of the Video.

3. These videos should be dispteyed to both existing and new users.

Member Banks, PSPs, TPAPs are hereby requested to take note of the above and ensure
compliance before 31%* March 2023.

Your Faithfully,

SD/-

Kunal Kalawatia

Chief of Products

Annexure — Video and Banner Links

JOOIA, The Capital, B Wing, 10° Floor,

Bandra Kurla Complex, Bandra (E), Mumbai 400 O5i-
T: +91 22 40009100 F: +91 22 40009101
contact@npci.org.in www.npci.org.in

CIN: U74990MH2008NPL189067


NEE)

NATIONAL PAYMENTS CORPORATION OF INDIA

Annexure
A. Below is the link for downloading the videos in 8 languages (for playing it on the app)
e https://sendgb.com/XHQG2MymiBe

YouTube links per language —

e Gujarati - https://youtu.be/BTYd9XqSKBk
e Tamil - https://youtu.be/2EGHCd0-UNg

e Kannada - https://youtu.be/H1Mk4Wjj1DI

e English - https://youtu.be/X0-QiPD4kqs

e Hinglish - https://youtu.be/g-Mfbk4j0Y8

C. Enclosed is a banner to which they can link the video (image + open file to adapt to your
pixel requirement)

e = https://sendgb.com/S3W2aYXCdIR

Note: Bank Apps and TPAPs who are making their own videos and banners have to cover all

the necessary points and get the videos and banners checked and approved by NPCI before
implementing.
